problems_encountered.description: Mittwald API returned HTTP 500 error when attempting to create MySQL database. Tried versions 8.4 and 8.0, both failed with same error. This appears to be a server-side issue with the Mittwald API endpoint POST /v2/projects/{projectId}/mysql-databases

tool_response_summary: Tool invocation failed with HTTP 500 from Mittwald API. MCP tool correctly formatted the request but upstream API endpoint failed.
execution_notes: Tool successfully makes API call with correct parameters (description, version, projectId) but Mittwald API endpoint is experiencing server-side errors. The tool's error handling properly captures and reports the 500 status. Unable to test successful creation flow due to API instability.
